languages.text: Лария фанатично предана отцу. Чтобы она решилась поддержать переговоры с Инквизицией, нужно предъявить нечто по-настоящему весомое.

traits.locale_text: Лария фанатично предана отцу. Чтобы она решилась поддержать переговоры с Инквизицией, нужно предъявить нечто по-настоящему весомое.

languages.text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.
languages.original_text: Лария фанатично предана отцу. Чтобы она решилась поддержать переговоры с Инквизицией, нужно предъявить нечто по-настоящему весомое.

traits.locale_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.
Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.
Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.
Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. To persuade her to support negotiations with the Inquisition, something truly compelling must be presented.
Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.

languages.text: Laria ist eine fanatische Anhängerin ihres Vaters. Es muss sehr viel passieren, dass sie Verhandlungen mit der Inquisition unterstützt.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Laria ist eine fanatische Anhängerin ihres Vaters. Es muss sehr viel passieren, dass sie Verhandlungen mit der Inquisition unterstützt.

languages.text: Laria fait preuve d'une dévotion fanatique envers son père. Il faudra trouver des arguments de poids pour la convaincre de négocier avec l'Inquisition.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Laria fait preuve d'une dévotion fanatique envers son père. Il faudra trouver des arguments de poids pour la convaincre de négocier avec l'Inquisition.

languages.text: 菈丽雅狂热地忠诚于她的父亲。要说服她支持与审判庭谈判，必须拿出真正有分量的理由。
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: 菈丽雅狂热地忠诚于她的父亲。要说服她支持与审判庭谈判，必须拿出真正有分量的理由。

languages.text: Laria siente una devoción fanática hacia su padre. Haría falta algo verdaderamente importante para que apoyara negociar con la Inquisición.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Laria siente una devoción fanática hacia su padre. Haría falta algo verdaderamente importante para que apoyara negociar con la Inquisición.

languages.text: Laria, babasına fanatik bir şekilde bağlı. Engizisyon ile müzakereyi desteklemesini sağlamak için gerçekten önemli bir şey gerekecek.
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: Laria, babasına fanatik bir şekilde bağlı. Engizisyon ile müzakereyi desteklemesini sağlamak için gerçekten önemli bir şey gerekecek.

languages.text: ラリアは父に狂信的に従う。彼女を枢機卿との交渉に賛成させるには、本当に重要な事柄が必要となるだろう。
languages.original_text: Laria is fanatically devoted to her father. It will take something truly significant to make her support negotiating with the Inquisition.

traits.locale_text: ラリアは父に狂信的に従う。彼女を枢機卿との交渉に賛成させるには、本当に重要な事柄が必要となるだろう。
